title: ranunculus simplicior
intro: Ranunculus simplicior is a plant species that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family, commonly known as buttercup. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a purgative and emetic, making it useful in treating various digestive issues. The health benefits of Ranunculus simplicior include its potential to treat constipation, indigestion, and other gastrointestinal problems, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tinctures, teas, and infusions, although it's essential to note that it should be used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity.
